description: Rich table cell content: cells with inline markup carry styled runs — bold/colored/sized segments inside one cell, clickable <a href> links in cells (URI annotations), underline decoration, RTL cells (dir attribute sets base direction, reorders per UAX #9, right-aligns by default), and nowrap clipping. Plain text-only cells keep the fast single-style path.
visual_assertions: The Total cell mixes regular, bold, and red-bold segments on shared lines.
The Details cell mixes 16pt and normal text with underline, wrapping across lines.
invoice #42 and 'a link' are blue, underlined, and clickable inside their cells.
The dir=rtl cell right-aligns and reads right-to-left with the bold Hebrew word styled.
The nowrap cell renders one clipped line; the plain cell looks unchanged.
